_comment: Frozen model-free localization probe against smallcode's OWN 644-file repo. Each case is a task/bug-report framed by MECHANISM (never a verbatim path), mirroring the real-repo condition the synthetic eval fixtures cannot reproduce (they name the target path, so PATH_MENTION dominates and localization is trivially 100%). truth = the file(s) that DEFINE the mechanism. hard=true marks cases where the definer's basename does NOT contain the concept words — these guard against over-fitting any basename-based ranking signal. Authored 2026-07-13 from the dogfood mislocalization (operator-mutation task locked onto loop.ts, the USER of the enumerator, not operator-mutation.ts, the DEFINER).

cases.query: Add support for flipping multiplicative operators * and / in the operator-mutation repair pass so it can crack a wrong-arithmetic bug.
The integer-literal brute-force repair only tries plus or minus one and two on whole numbers; extend the literal mutation enumerator to also perturb decimal constants.
When the model deletes a line it still needs to read, we inject a read-after-delete hint telling it to reorder. Make the hint fire one turn earlier.
Retrieval keeps ranking the wrong file first on big repos. Fix how source files are scored and ordered by their lexical relevance to the task.
The routine that recursively walks the repository directory tree and lists every source file skips too many entries. Add support for one more source extension.
The stall-rescue routine that walks the model's attention from one editable file to the next — the carousel — visits files in the wrong order. Fix the visitation order.
Widen the single-file edit lock into a bounded editable set built from the primary target plus the files it directly imports.
The planner sometimes emits a bare file path instead of an action as a sub-goal. Tighten how the task is decomposed into ordered sub-goals.
Before the model has read any file it should be in explore phase and write tools stay gated. Adjust the phase gate that decides explore vs edit.
Compare two metric snapshots and flag a regression only when the confidence intervals do not overlap. Fix the run fingerprint diff.
Detect when a small model produced only chain-of-thought and no tool call, and strip the reasoning block before applying edits.
Report pass@k with a 95% bootstrap confidence interval instead of a bare point estimate over the trials.
Run the test suite as the correctness oracle and early-stop the agent loop the moment every test is green.
When the prompt is very large the tokens-per-second watchdog wrongly reports a degraded model and thrashes a reload; make it abstain on big prompts.
Decide whether an edit should be a whole-file rewrite or a single-function patch based on the file's line count.
When a search-replace edit block does not match exactly, run a fuzzy repair pass to re-anchor it before giving up.
